style_suffix: Flat pixel art, hard edges, no anti-aliasing, no gradients, solid color blocks, Minecraft style, transparent background.

style_anchor.prompt: A lineup of five Minecraft mobs (zombie, creeper, skeleton, spider, pig) all wearing ridiculous handmade cow costumes. Each costume is slightly different and badly fitting. They stand in a row on a Minecraft grass block stage. One holds a sign saying "We are ALL cows now." Flat pixel art, Minecraft style, comedic, warm colors, transparent background.

textures.prompt: Minecraft skin texture sheet, flat UV layout, 64x64 pixels. A zombie wearing a full Holstein cow costume — black and white cow-print bodysuit, pink udder hanging off the belt, tiny horns poking through a rotting green head, one googly eye. Comedically grumpy expression. The cow spots are stitched on like patches. Flat pixel art style, hard edges, no anti-aliasing, solid color blocks, transparent background. Laid out as a Minecraft entity skin template with front, back, left, right, top, bottom faces visible.

Minecraft entity skin texture sheet, flat UV unwrap, 64x64. A creeper whose entire body is a tall rectangular milk carton with black and white cow spots. The creeper face is replaced by a dopey smiling cow face with a daisy in its mouth. Hooves instead of feet. "MOO-BOOM" printed on the side in blocky red letters. Flat pixel art, hard edges, no gradients, no shading, Minecraft style, transparent background.

Minecraft skin texture UV sheet, 64x64. A skeleton made entirely of cow bones — rib cage shaped like a cow's ribcage, skull is a cow skull with horns, holding a bow made from a bent cow femur. Wearing a tiny cowbell necklace. Off-white bone color with brown spots where marrow shows through. Flat pixel art, hard-edged blocks, Minecraft entity template layout, transparent background.

Minecraft entity texture sheet, flat UV map, 64x64. A spider covered in fluffy Holstein cow-print fur, eight legs ending in tiny hooves, eight beady eyes replaced with two big dopey cow eyes. A miniature cowbell dangles from each leg. Absurdly cute and round. Flat pixel art style, no anti-aliasing, Minecraft template layout, transparent background.

Minecraft entity texture flat UV sheet, 64x64. An impossibly tall, slender cow standing upright — long black and white spotted body, unnervingly long legs ending in hooves, holding a grass block in one hoof. Purple particle eyes replaced with glowing purple cow eyes. Wears a tiny top hat. Flat pixel art, hard edges, Minecraft skin template format, transparent background.

Minecraft entity texture sheet, flat UV, 64x64. A floating cow head surrounded by spinning butter sticks instead of blaze rods. The cow face is bright orange like cheddar cheese, steam coming from nostrils. Molten cheese drips. Expression: smugly content. Flat pixel art, Minecraft style, no gradients, template layout, transparent background.

Minecraft entity texture sheet, 64x64. A massive floating cow head — puffy white like mozzarella, enormous sad cow eyes with a single tear, tiny useless hooves dangling underneath. When it opens its mouth you see a pink tongue and the word "moo" in a speech bubble. Flat pixel art, hard-edged, Minecraft UV template, transparent background.

Minecraft skin texture sheet, flat UV, 64x64. A cow wearing a purple witch hat and robe, holding a potion bottle filled with milk. Green wart on nose. Suspicious squinting cow eyes. Hooves poking out of sleeves. Cow tail sticking out the back of the robe. Flat pixel art, hard edges, Minecraft entity template, transparent background.

Minecraft skin texture sheet, 64x64 flat UV. A pig wearing a very unconvincing cow costume — cardboard horns taped to head, black spots painted on with dripping paint, a fake udder made from a rubber glove, a sign around neck reading "I AM COW". Pig snout still visible. Hilariously bad disguise. Flat pixel art, Minecraft template layout, transparent background.

16x16 pixel art texture tile, seamless. Gray stone surface with subtle Holstein black and white cow spots fossilized into the rock. A tiny cow hoof print embedded like a fossil. Flat colors, no gradients, Minecraft block style, tileable.

16x16 pixel art seamless tile. Brown dirt with patches of cow-print pattern mixed in. A half-buried cowbell visible in one corner. Small tufts of grass shaped like tiny cow horns. Minecraft block texture style, flat colors, hard edges.

16x16 pixel art seamless tile. Dark stone with glowing blue diamonds replaced by glowing blue cowbells embedded in the rock. Cow-spot pattern in the stone. Minecraft ore texture style, flat pixel art, no anti-aliasing.

16x16 pixel art texture, all four sides. Red TNT block but the label reads "MOO" in white blocky letters. Black and white cow spots on the red surface. A cartoon cow tail as the fuse on top. Minecraft block style, flat colors.

16x16 pixel art tile. Wooden crafting table top but the grid lines are made of cow spots. Tools on the side replaced with milk bucket, cowbell, and a butter knife. "Brindal & Grayson's Workshop" carved into the wood in tiny pixel letters. Minecraft style, flat.

256x256 pixel art. Two cartoon Minecraft-style cows wearing crowns, one labeled "B" and one labeled "G" on their ear tags. They stand on a grassy hill with a Minecraft sunset behind them. A banner above reads "BRINDAL & GRAYSON'S COW WORLD" in blocky Minecraft font. Stars and cowbells border the image. Warm, joyful, silly. Clean pixel art, Minecraft aesthetic.
Minecraft GUI texture, flat pixel art. Inventory slot background in cow-hide leather texture — tan with subtle brown cow spots. Border is a rope lasso pattern. Clean, readable, 16x16 tile for slots.

16x16 pixel art item sprite, transparent background. A sword made from a cow horn — ivory white with brown base, wrapped handle made of leather strips, a tiny cowbell pommel. Minecraft item style, flat colors, 45-degree angle.

16x16 pixel art item. A pickaxe where the head is two cow horns mounted on a wooden stick, handle wrapped in cow hide. A small "B&G" brand mark on the handle. Minecraft item sprite style, transparent background.

Minecraft sun texture, 32x32 pixel art, transparent background. A giant golden cowbell radiating light beams. The clapper hangs down. Warm yellow glow. Simple, iconic, unmistakably a cowbell. Flat pixel art.

Minecraft moon texture, 32x32 pixel art, transparent background. A wheel of Swiss cheese with holes, cow-spot shadows on the surface. Crescent phases should show bite marks as if a cow ate part of it. Flat pixel art, pale yellow.

Minecraft-style blocky landscape panorama face, 512x512. Rolling green hills packed with hundreds of Minecraft cows. Cow-print clouds, giant golden cowbell sun, rivers of milk. Wooden sign: Welcome Brindal & Grayson! Warm golden hour. Front view.
Minecraft-style blocky landscape panorama cubemap face, 512x512. Hills covered in cows, milk rivers, cowbell sun on horizon. Right side view of cow world. Warm colors, blocky aesthetic.
Minecraft-style blocky landscape panorama cubemap face, 512x512. Back view of endless cow herds on green hills, cow-print sky, silly and joyful. Blocky Minecraft aesthetic.
Minecraft-style blocky landscape panorama cubemap face, 512x512. Left side view of cow-covered hills, milk streams, cowbell sun. Brindal and Grayson cow world. Warm golden light.
Minecraft-style sky panorama cubemap face looking up, 512x512. Cow-print clouds, giant glowing cowbell sun radiating light beams, blocky blue sky. Flat pixel art Minecraft style.
Minecraft-style ground panorama cubemap face looking down, 512x512. Grass blocks with cow hoof prints, dirt with cow spots, blocky top-down Minecraft terrain.

Minecraft skin texture UV sheet, 64x64. A wither skeleton made of charcoal-black cow bones — ribcage like a cow skeleton, skull is a cow skull with curved horns, holding a stone sword. Faint Holstein spots on bones where marrow glows. Menacing but silly. Flat pixel art, Minecraft entity template, transparent background.

Minecraft entity texture sheet, flat UV, 64x64. A fish guardian with Holstein cow-spotted scales, one giant dopey cow eye in the center, spikes replaced with tiny horns. Pink udder underside. Looks deeply offended. Flat pixel art, hard edges, Minecraft template layout, transparent background.

Minecraft entity texture sheet, 64x64 flat UV. A translucent green slime cube with a cow face visible inside like a trapped mascot in jello. Black and white spots float inside the gel. Comically squished expression. Flat pixel art, Minecraft style, transparent background.

Minecraft skin texture sheet, flat UV, 64x64. An illager bandit wearing a cow-print bandana mask and Holstein spotted poncho, crossbow made from a cow femur. Angry eyebrows but cow nose visible. Flat pixel art, Minecraft entity template, transparent background.

Minecraft entity texture sheet, 64x64 flat UV. A massive beast with enormous cow horns, Holstein hide armor plates, iron saddle with cowbell dangling. Mouth full of hay. Looks like a bull that raided a village. Flat pixel art, hard edges, Minecraft template, transparent background.

Minecraft entity texture sheet, flat UV, 64x64. A dark teal warden with bioluminescent Holstein cow spots pulsing on its chest. No eyes — just a glowing cow nose silhouette. Scary but absurdly spotted. Flat pixel art, Minecraft template layout, transparent background.

Minecraft entity texture sheet, 64x64 flat UV. A wind spirit made of swirling cream-and-black cow-print mist, tiny horns of compressed air, eyes like spinning cowbells. Whimsical tornado shape. Flat pixel art, hard edges, Minecraft template, transparent background.

Minecraft entity texture sheet, flat UV, 64x64. A giant elder guardian fish with pale cow-spotted scales, enormous tired cow eye, crown of coral shaped like horns. Ancient and judgmental. Flat pixel art, Minecraft template, transparent background.

Minecraft entity texture sheet, 64x64 flat UV. The Wither boss with three cow skull heads instead of skeleton skulls, each with horns. Dark body with charcoal Holstein spots. Ribcage exposed like a cow skeleton. Terrifying but ridiculous. Flat pixel art, Minecraft template, transparent background.

Minecraft skin texture sheet, 64x64 flat UV. A chicken with Holstein cow-spotted feathers, tiny useless cow horns on its head, beak still visible. Lays milk instead of eggs (tiny milk bottle under wing). Flat pixel art, Minecraft entity template, transparent background.

Minecraft entity texture sheet, flat UV, 64x64. A horse wearing a full Holstein cow-print bodysuit over its brown coat, cardboard cow ears, tail is a cow tail. Horse face peeking out confused. Flat pixel art, Minecraft template, transparent background.

Minecraft entity texture sheet, 64x64 flat UV. A wolf with fluffy Holstein cow-spotted fur, floppy cow ears, pink udder on belly. Still has wolf fangs but looks embarrassed about the costume. Flat pixel art, hard edges, Minecraft template, transparent background.

Minecraft skin texture sheet, flat UV, 64x64. A black cat with Holstein white cow spots painted on (badly), tiny cow horns headband, tail has a cowbell. Cat eyes still judging everyone. Flat pixel art, Minecraft entity template, transparent background.

Minecraft entity texture sheet, 64x64 flat UV. A bee with black and white Holstein stripes replacing yellow-black, tiny cow horns on head, wings shaped like milk carton flaps. Buzzing angrily. Flat pixel art, Minecraft template, transparent background.

Minecraft entity texture sheet, flat UV, 64x64. An iron golem with cow-pattern metal plates welded on, face is a stamped cow face with horns, poppy replaced with a daisy. Village protector cosplaying as a cow. Flat pixel art, hard edges, Minecraft template, transparent background.

Minecraft villager skin texture sheet, flat UV, 64x64. A villager wearing a Holstein cow-print robe with hood, cow horn headpiece poking through, big nose still visible. Holding a milk bucket. Flat pixel art, Minecraft entity template, transparent background.

Minecraft player skin texture sheet, 64x64 flat UV. Cute child character Brindal wearing a full brown-and-white Holstein cow costume onesie with hood ears, pink udder on belly, tiny crown on head, letter B on chest. Adorable, joyful. Flat pixel art, Minecraft skin template, transparent background.

Minecraft player skin texture sheet, 64x64 flat UV. Cute child character Grayson wearing a gray cow costume onesie with hood horns, dark Holstein spots, letter G on chest, cow tail. Mischievous grin. Flat pixel art, Minecraft skin template, transparent background.
Seamless tile. Gray stone with dark black coal ore spots arranged like Holstein cow spots on white-gray stone. Minecraft ore block texture, flat pixel art, hard edges, tileable.
Seamless tile. Stone with tan-beige iron ore flecks on Holstein black-and-white cow-spotted stone base. Minecraft ore texture, flat colors, tileable.
Seamless tile. Stone with golden-yellow ore spots on black-and-white cow hide pattern background. Minecraft gold ore block, flat pixel art, tileable.
Seamless tile. Dark stone with green emerald crystals scattered on Holstein cow-pattern background. Minecraft ore texture, flat pixel art, tileable.
Seamless tile. Green grass block top with grass blades forming subtle cow spot patterns in darker green. Minecraft grass texture, flat shading, tileable.
Seamless tile. Dark red netherrack surface with black cow spot pattern baked into the rock. Nether dimension block, flat pixel art, tileable.
Seamless tile. Dark brown soul sand with screaming cow face impressions pressed into the surface. Eerie but silly. Minecraft block texture, flat pixel art, tileable.
Seamless tile. Pale yellow end stone with cream cow spot pattern. The End dimension block, flat colors, Minecraft style, tileable.
Seamless tile. Gray cobblestone pieces with Holstein black-and-white patches on individual stones. Minecraft block texture, flat pixel art, tileable.
Stone furnace front face with cow-nose shaped opening, dark interior. Off version unlit. Minecraft block texture, flat pixel art.
Wooden chest front with cow face latch design and Holstein spots on the wood planks. Minecraft block texture, flat pixel art.
Item sprite. Cooked beef steak with grill marks shaped like tiny cow spots, brown and juicy. Minecraft item icon, 45-degree angle, transparent background.
Item sprite. Gray bucket overflowing with white milk, Holstein cow spot pattern on the bucket sides. Minecraft item icon, transparent background.
Item sprite. Golden apple with tiny cow silhouette shine reflection on the surface. Magical golden glow. Minecraft item icon, transparent background.
Item sprite. Brown cowhide leather piece with visible Holstein black and white spots. Minecraft item icon, transparent background.
Item sprite. Cyan diamond gem with tiny cow silhouette reflection inside the facets. Minecraft item icon, transparent background.
Item sprite. Bow made from a curved cow horn, leather string, wooden grip with cow spot inlay. Minecraft item icon, transparent background.
Item sprite. Bread loaf with Holstein cow spot pattern on the crust. Minecraft food item icon, transparent background.
Minecraft HUD icon. Red heart shape with subtle Holstein cow spots, full health heart. Tiny pixel art, transparent background.
Minecraft HUD icon. Cooked cow steak replacing the hunger drumstick, brown with grill marks. Full hunger icon. Tiny pixel art, transparent background.
Minecraft crosshair. Cow nose nostrils shape — two dark oval nostrils with a horizontal line between them. Centered targeting reticle. Tiny pixel art, transparent background.
